params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 you V10-A regression fix per #693 verdict (PARTIAL_engine_only — SPA generic error, no bubble). Hypothesis: you SPA route changed to /search?q= URL-based, you_sse_v3 SSE envelope mismatched. V10-A switches to you_json (Next.js SSP error page shape). Tests if {pageProps:{error:true,message},__N_SSP:true} renders as visible warning.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — observe URL transition (does it go to /search?q=...?)
3. Check Network response: is it now Next.js SSP JSON {pageProps:...}?
4. Check page render: does Korean warning text appear?
5. Compare to #693 verdict — is generic error replaced by visible warning?

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible (text in #693's '경고' or '⚠️' format) + no generic error
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_engine_only: engine fires but no warning visible — escalate to V10-B
verdict_criteria.FAIL: engine doesn't fire OR new fatal error

notes: 48차 you V10-A — switch from you_sse_v3 to you_json envelope per #693 P4 regression (SPA route change to /search URL-based).
